name: thinkfeel-plugin
description: Developer setup automation for ThinkFeel projects.

interface.shortDescription: Set up ThinkFeel developer projects from Codex.
defaultPrompt: Create a Playground API key for this project
Configure this ThinkFeel project for local development
interface.longDescription: Use ThinkFeel Plugin to configure local ThinkFeel projects, including secure Playground API key setup and ThinkFeel SDK environment variables.
